**Federal Route 174** comprising **Jalan Sultan Zainal Abidin** and **Jalan Sultan Mahmud** is a federal road in [Kuala Terengganu](/wiki/Kuala_Terengganu "Kuala Terengganu"), [Terengganu](/wiki/Terengganu "Terengganu"), [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia").[[1]](#cite_note-jkr-1) The Kilometre Zero of the Federal Route 174 starts at Batu Burok.

## Features

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Malaysia_Federal_Route_174&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Features")]

At most sections, the Federal Route 174 was built under the JKR R5 road standard, with a speed limit of 90 km/h.
